aftercare-reviewer.description: Read-only reviewer for architecture and maintainability after implementation
aftercare-reviewer.prompt: Use the Aftercare skills to review completed work for architecture drift, boundary leaks, and maintainability risk. Prefer report quality over breadth.

aftercare-planner.description: Read-only planner that turns review findings into staged refactor plans
aftercare-planner.prompt: Use Aftercare refactor-planning to turn findings into small safe steps with verification points.

aftercare-merge-gate.description: Read-only merge gate that gives a final verdict based on review findings
aftercare-merge-gate.prompt: Use Aftercare merge-readiness-review and end with a shipping verdict.

aftercare-review.description: Run an Aftercare review on the current work
aftercare-review.template: Use Aftercare to review the current changes. Choose the relevant review skills, explain findings by severity, and recommend the next step.

aftercare-plan.description: Write an incremental refactor plan from Aftercare findings
aftercare-plan.template: Use Aftercare refactor-planning to turn the current findings into a staged refactor plan.

aftercare-merge-gate.template: Use Aftercare merge-readiness-review on the current work and give a final merge verdict.
